message.content:
@startuml
title Tennis Court Booking System

actor users as u1
actor siteManager as u2
actor SystemAdministrator as admin1
actor SystemAdministrator as admin2

participant u1 as "users"
participant u2 as "siteManager"
participant admin1 as "SystemAdministrator"
participant admin2 as "SystemAdministrator"

u1 ..> admin1 : bookSite()
admin1 ..> u2 : deliverUserRequirements()
u2 ..> admin1 : queryUnoccupiedSite()
admin1 ..> u2 : returnUnoccupiedSiteInfo()
admin1 ..> u2 : decidedSite()
admin1 ..> u1 : noticeSiteInfo()

@enduml
